title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: August 10, 2023
summary: August 10 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a much higher rate of 11.01% , from the level on 08/03/2023 of 6.694 M km 2 to 5.957 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laboratory...
